subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: Grace abideth, yet grace requireth capacity that it may be received, even as the coming of rain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فضل است لکن فضل استعداد لازم دارد که قبول کند مثلا آمدن باران
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium, @development of capacity and readiness, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
